meaning: 纽汉[英国英格兰东南部城市]
examples: Three miles east of the City, the borough of Newham is living proof.
Newham lays claim to being one of the most diverse places in Britain.
Vivian Archer at Newham Bookshop in London, E13: "We launched 37 years ago."
There will also be elections for directly elected mayors in Hackney, Lewisham, Newham and Tower Hamlets.
Stratford Academy in Newham has stayed open, with pupils coming in for part of the day.
